comment: 58yo female, residential radon measurement 8.5 pCi/L (EPA threshold 4 pCi/L), former smoker (quit 5y ago, 20 pack-years). No current cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = radon mitigation (sub-slab depressurization) + annual LDCT screening adjusted for radon-elevated risk; alternative = routine cadence per USPSTF general population. Validates v0.3 radon → lung cancer prevention pilot. Radon-smoking synergy notable.
